generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorShaftEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Dual position encoder positioned on motor shaft of MABI MAX 100 first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorShaftAngleTopic
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Dual position encoder after the gearbox of the same axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleTopic
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor feeding the CNC controller with motor current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentTopic
]

instance CNCJointMeasurement : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CNC controller internal measurement of joint angle, torque, and angular velocity derived from encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CNCJointAngleTopic, CNCJointTorqueTopic, CNCJointVelocityTopic
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorShaftAngleTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance CNCJointAngleTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CNCJointMeasurement
]

instance CNCJointTorqueTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CNCJointMeasurement
]

instance CNCJointVelocityTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CNCJointMeasurement
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance MotorShaftAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor shaft joint angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftAngleTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, FrictionIdentificationEnabler, ModelUpdateEnabler
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox joint angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, FrictionIdentificationEnabler, ModelUpdateEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current I_M data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, FrictionIdentificationEnabler, ModelUpdateEnabler
]

instance CNCJointAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "CNC measured joint angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CNCJointAngleTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, FrictionIdentificationEnabler, ModelUpdateEnabler
]

instance CNCJointTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "CNC measured joint torque τ_M data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CNCJointTorqueTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, FrictionIdentificationEnabler, ModelUpdateEnabler
]

instance CNCJointVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "CNC measured joint angular velocity ω_M data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CNCJointVelocityTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, FrictionIdentificationEnabler, ModelUpdateEnabler
]

instance EngineeredAxisModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block-definition and internal diagrams of the MABI MAX 100 first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler, SimulinkExecutorEnabler
]

instance MotorSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink block for the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor with friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutorEnabler, FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance GearwheelSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink block for the gearwheel with friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutorEnabler
]

instance CycloidalGearboxSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink block for the cycloidal gearbox with friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutorEnabler
]

instance FullSystemSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink block representing the entire first vertical axis, integrating motor, gearwheel, gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutorEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker handling real‑time sensor data transport"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ModelUpdatingService, RealTimeComparisonService, DashboardVisualizationService, ParameterTuningService
]

instance SimulinkExecutorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment for running simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine performing automatic friction identification using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Backend service storing and serving data for dashboard visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance ModelUpdateEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service that continuously updates white‑box and black‑box model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelUpdatingService
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service that updates CNC control parameters based on insights"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterTuningService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated friction identification and model parameter updating"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCoefficientsInsight, UpdateFrictionParametersAction
]

instance ModelUpdatingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous white‑box and black‑box model updating"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyInsight, UpdateModelParametersAction
]

instance RealTimeComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time comparison of simulated versus measured joint behaviour"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationMatchingInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of data traces"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardDataInsight
]

instance ParameterTuningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Actionable insights for parameter tuning to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateControlParametersAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation execution of models within MATLAB/Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCoefficientsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing identified static, kinetic, and viscous friction coefficients per axis"
]

instance ModelAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight quantifying deviation between simulated and measured joint states"
]

instance SimulationMatchingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating real‑time deviation between simulated and measured joint behaviour"
]

instance DashboardDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight presenting data traces on the dashboard"
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reporting simulated joint states"
]

instance UpdateFrictionParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to update friction model parameters on the simulation engine"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateModelParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to update model parameters for white‑box/black‑box models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to update CNC controller control settings to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time operation; data streams at the rate of the CNC controller outputs (typically hundreds of Hz) and processing performed online to keep the DT synchronized with the PT operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A central DT consisting of an Asset Administration Shell, a processing component that consumes sensor streams, executes the simulation models, and outputs data traces, all orchestrated within a dashboard for user interaction."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated phase – the digital shadow represents the robot while in operation, providing real‑time monitoring and model calibration for that operating condition."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of every data point back to its source and the processing model; comparison of simulated versus measured signals to validate friction models; continuous identification updating parameters in both white‑box physics‑based and black‑box data‑driven models; use of AAS to enforce consistency of asset metadata."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT is used to stream real‑time sensor data from the PT to the DT; the DT exposes data through the AAS interface; internal processing uses standard TCP/IP networking within the local network."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Data exchange is facilitated by the Asset Administration Shell, which enables standard interfaces; no explicit integration with other DTs or enterprise systems is mentioned."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standards applied: SysML for system modeling, UML for class diagrams, Asset Administration Shell (AAS) as standard semantic layer, MBSE practices (RFLP/SPES) for engineering discipline."
]
